title: Three Steps to Clarity
intro: Getting started takes seconds. The impact lasts a lifetime.

steps.title: Write Naturally
steps.desc: Open Noty and start typing. Our distraction-free editor feels like paper, works like magic.

steps.title: Organize Smartly
steps.desc: Drag, tag, and stack your notes into collections. Your brain's natural structure, mirrored digitally.

steps.title: Share & Collaborate
steps.desc: Share notebooks with your team, publish notes to the web, or keep them private — you decide.
